val="${e.serAxisMinorUnit}"/>`)),n+="</c:serAx>",n}function Os(e,t,r){const n=e.titleAlign==="left"||e.titleAlign==="right"?`<a:pPr algn="${e.titleAlign.substring(0,1)}">`:"<a:pPr>",a=e.titleRotate?`<a:bodyPr rot="${Pa(e.titleRotate)}"/>`:"<a:bodyPr/>",o=e.fontSize?`sz="${Math.round(e.fontSize*100)}"`:"",i=e.titleBold?1:0;let l="<c:layout/>";if(e.titlePos&&typeof e.titlePos.x=="number"&&typeof e.titlePos.y=="number"){const u=e.titlePos.x+t,s=e.titlePos.y+r;let c=u===0?0:u*(u/5)/10;c>=1&&(c=c/10),c>=.1&&(c=c/10);let d=s===0?0:s*(s/5)/10;d>=1&&(d=d/10),d>=.1&&(d=d/10),l=`<c:layout><c:manualLayout><c:xMode val="edge"/><c:yMode val="edge"/><c:x val="${c}"/><c:y val="${d}"/></c:manualLayout></c:layout>`}return`<c:title>
      <c:tx>
        <c:rich>
          ${a}
          <a:lstStyle/>
          <a:p>
            ${n}
            <a:defRPr ${o} b="${i}" i="0" u="none" strike="noStrike">
              <a:solidFill>${Ke(e.color||fr)}</a:solidFill>
              <a:latin typeface="${e.fontFace||"Arial"}"/>
            </a:defRPr>
          </a:pPr>
          <a:r>
            <a:rPr ${o} b="${i}" i="0" u="none" strike="noStrike">
              <a:solidFill>${Ke(e.color||fr)}</a:solidFill>
              <a:latin typeface="${e.fontFace||"Arial"}"/>
            </a:rPr>
            <a:t>${Fe(e.title)||""}</a:t>
          </a:r>
        </a:p>
        </c:rich>
      </c:tx>
      ${l}
      <c:overlay val="0"/>
    </c:title>`}function nt(e){let t="";const r=e-1;return r<=25?t=ci[r]:t=`${ci[Math.floor(r/ci.length-1)]}${ci[r%ci.length]}`,t}function Da(e,t){if(e){if(typeof e!="object")return console.warn("`shadow` options must be an object. Ex: `{shadow: {type:'none'}}`"),"<a:effectLst/>"}else return"<a:effectLst/>";let r="<a:effectLst>";const n=Object.assign(Object.assign({},t),e),a=n.type||"outer",o=Pe(n.blur),i=Pe(n.offset),l=Math.round(n.angle*6e4),u=n.color,s=Math.round(n.opacity*1e5),c=n.rotateWithShape?1:0;return r+=`<a:${a}Shdw sx="100000" sy="100000" kx="0" ky="0"  algn="bl" blurRad="${o}" rotWithShape="${c}" dist="${i}" dir="${l}">`,r+=`<a:srgbClr val="${u}">`,r+=`<a:alpha val="${s}"/></a:srgbClr>`,r+=`</a:${a}Shdw>`,r+="</a:effectLst>",r}function ku(e){let t="<c:majorGridlines>";return t+=" <c:spPr>",t+=`  <a:ln w="${Pe(e.size||Ta.size)}" cap="${Ms(e.cap||Ta.cap)}">`,t+='  <a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val="'+(e.color||Ta.color)+'"/></a:solidFill>',t+='   <a:prstDash val="'+(e.style||Ta.style)+'"/><a:round/>',t+="  </a:ln>",t+=" </c:spPr>",t+="</c:majorGridlines>",t}function Ms(e){if(!e||e==="flat")return"flat";if(e==="square")return"sq";if(e==="round")return"rnd";{const t=e;throw new Error(`Invalid chart line cap: ${t}`)}}function Su(e){var t,r;const n=typeof process<"u"&&!!(!((t=process.versions)===null||t===void 0)&&t.node)&&((r=process.release)===null||r===void 0?void 0:r.name)==="node";let a,o;const i=n?()=>br(this,void 0,void 0,function*(){({default:a}=yield Promise.resolve().then(()=>zd)),{default:o}=yield Promise.resolve().then(()=>zd)}):()=>br(this,void 0,void 0,function*(){});n&&i();const l=[],u=e._relsMedia.filter(c=>c.type!=="online"&&!c.data&&(!c.path||c.path&&!c.path.includes("preencoded"))),s=[];return u.forEach(c=>{s.includes(c.path)?c.isDuplicate=!0:(c.isDuplicate=!1,s.push(c.path))}),u.filter(c=>!c.isDuplicate).forEach(c=>{l.push(br(this,void 0,void 0,function*(){if(o||(yield i()),n&&a&&c.path.indexOf("http")!==0)try{const d=a.readFileSync(c.path);return c.data=Buffer.from(d).toString("base64"),u.filter(f=>f.isDuplicate&&f.path===c.path).forEach(f=>f.data=c.data),"done"}catch(d){throw c.data=co,u.filter(f=>f.isDuplicate&&f.path===c.path).forEach(f=>f.data=c.data),new Error(`ERROR: Unable to read media: "${c.path}"
${String(d)}`)}return n&&o&&c.path.startsWith("http")?yield new Promise((d,f)=>{o.get(c.path,p=>{let A="";p.setEncoding("binary"),p.on("data",h=>A+=h),p.on("end",()=>{c.data=Buffer.from(A,"binary").toString("base64"),u.filter(h=>h.isDuplicate&&h.path===c.path).forEach(h=>h.data=c.data),d("done")}),p.on("error",()=>{c.data=co,u.filter(h=>h.isDuplicate&&h.path===c.path).forEach(h=>h.data=c.data),f(new Error(`ERROR! Unable to load image (https.get): ${c.path}`))})})}):yield new Promise((d,f)=>{const p=new XMLHttpRequest;p.onload=()=>{const A=new FileReader;A.onloadend=()=>{c.data=A.result,u.filter(h=>h.isDuplicate&&h.path===c.path).forEach(h=>h.data=c.data),c.isSvgPng?jh(c).then(()=>d("done")).catch(f):d("done")},A.readAsDataURL(p.response)},p.onerror=()=>{c.data=co,u.filter(A=>A.isDuplicate&&A.path===c.path).forEach(A=>A.data=c.data),f(new Error(`ERROR! ContentType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.notesSlide+xml"/>`}),r._relsChart.forEach(a=>{n+=' <Override PartName="'+a.Target+'" ContentType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.drawingml.chart+xml"/>'}),r._relsMedia.forEach(a=>{a.type!=="image"&&a.type!=="online"&&a.type!=="chart"&&a.extn!=="m4v"&&!n.includes(a.type)&&(n+=' <Default Extension="'+a.extn+'" ContentType="'+a.type+'"/>')}),n+=' <Override PartName="/docProps/core.xml" ContentType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-package.core-properties+xml"/>',n+=' <Override PartName="/docProps/app.xml" ContentType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.extended-properties+xml"/>',n+="</Types>",n}function e_(){return`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>${$t}<Relationships xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships">
		<Relationship Id="rId1" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/extended-properties" Target="docProps/app.xml"/>
		<Relationship Id="rId2" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships/metadata/core-properties" Target="docProps/core.xml"/>
		<Relationship Id="rId3" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/officeDocument" Target="ppt/presentation.xml"/>
		</Relationships>`}function t_(e,t){return`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>${$t}<Properties xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/extended-properties" xmlns:vt="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/docPropsVTypes">
	<TotalTime>0</TotalTime>
	<Words>0</Words>
	<Application>Microsoft Office PowerPoint</Application>
	<PresentationFormat>On-screen Show (16:9)</PresentationFormat>
	<Paragraphs>0</Paragraphs>
	<Slides>${e.length}</Slides>
	<Notes>${e.length}</Notes>
	<HiddenSlides>0</HiddenSlides>
	<MMClips>0</MMClips>
	<ScaleCrop>false</ScaleCrop>
	<HeadingPairs>
		<vt:vector size="6" baseType="variant">
			<vt:variant><vt:lpstr>Fonts Used</vt:lpstr></vt:variant>
			<vt:variant><vt:i4>2</vt:i4></vt:variant>
			<vt:variant><vt:lpstr>Theme</vt:lpstr></vt:variant>
			<vt:variant><vt:i4>1</vt:i4></vt:variant>
			<vt:variant><vt:lpstr>Slide Titles</vt:lpstr></vt:variant>
			<vt:variant><vt:i4>${e.length}</vt:i4></vt:variant>
		</vt:vector>
	</HeadingPairs>
	<TitlesOfParts>
		<vt:vector size="${e.length+1+2}" baseType="lpstr">
			<vt:lpstr>Arial</vt:lpstr>
			<vt:lpstr>Calibri</vt:lpstr>
			<vt:lpstr>Office Theme</vt:lpstr>
			${e.map((r,n)=>`<vt:lpstr>Slide ${n+1}</vt:lpstr>`).join("")}
		</vt:vector>
	</TitlesOfParts>
	<Company>${t}</Company>
	<LinksUpToDate>false</LinksUpToDate>
	<SharedDoc>false</SharedDoc>
	<HyperlinksChanged>false</HyperlinksChanged>
	<AppVersion>16.0000</AppVersion>
	</Properties>`}function r_(e,t,r,n){return`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
	<cp:coreProperties xmlns:cp="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/metadata/core-properties" xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:dcterms="http://purl.org/dc/terms/" xmlns:dcmitype="http://purl.org/dc/dcmitype/" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
		<dc:title>${Fe(e)}</dc:title>
		<dc:subject>${Fe(t)}</dc:subject>
		<dc:creator>${Fe(r)}</dc:creator>
		<cp:lastModifiedBy>${Fe(r)}</cp:lastModifiedBy>
		<cp:revision>${n}</cp:revision>
		<dcterms:created xsi:type="dcterms:W3CDTF">${new Date().toISOString().replace(/\.\d\d\dZ/,"Z")}</dcterms:created>
		<dcterms:modified xsi:type="dcterms:W3CDTF">${new Date().toISOString().replace(/\.\d\d\dZ/,"Z")}</dcterms:modified>
	</cp:coreProperties>`}function n_(e){let t=1,r='<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>'+$t;r+='<Relationships xmlns="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships">',r+='<Relationship Id="rId1" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/slideMaster" Target="slideMasters/slideMaster1.xml"/>';for(let n=1;n<=e.length;n++)r+=`<Relationship Id="rId${++t}" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/slide" Target="slides/slide${n}.xml"/>`;return t++,r+=`<Relationship Id="rId${t+0}" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/notesMaster" Target="notesMasters/notesMaster1.xml"/><Relationship Id="rId${t+1}" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/presProps" Target="presProps.xml"/><Relationship Id="rId${t+2}" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/viewProps" Target="viewProps.xml"/><Relationship Id="rId${t+3}" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/theme" Target="theme/theme1.xml"/><Relationship Id="rId${t+4}" Type="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/tableStyles" Target="tableStyles.xml"/></Relationships>`,r}function a_(e){return`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>${$t}<p:sld xmlns:a="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main" xmlns:r="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships" xmlns:p="http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/presentationml/2006/main"${e?.hidden?' show="0"':""}>${Eu(e)}<p:clrMapOvr><a:masterClrMapping/></p:clrMapOvr></p:sld>`}function o_(e){let t="";return e._slideObjects.forEach(r=>{r._type===Re.notes&&(t+=r?.text&&r.text[0]?r.text[0].text:"")}),t.replace(/\r*\n/g,$t)}function i_(){return`<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" uS=U2,dS=$2,cm=O2,fS=q2,pS=M2,AS=F2,hS=W2,gS=(e,t,r)=>{const n=new Map,a={platform:sS,...r},o={...a.platform,_c:n};return R2(e,t,{...a,platform:o})};function mS(e){return e!=null&&typeof e=="object"&&"$el"in e}function sd(e){if(mS(e)){const t=e.$el;return ed(t)&&Na(t)==="#comment"?null:t}return e}function yo(e){return typeof e=="function"?e():b(e)}function vS(e){return{name:"arrow",options:e,fn(t){const r=sd(yo(e.element));return r==null?{}:AS({element:r,padding:e.padding}).fn(t)}}}function um(e){return typeof window>"u"?1:(e.ownerDocument.defaultView||window).devicePixelRatio||1}function dm(e,t){const r=um(e);return Math.round(t*r)/r}function bS(e,t,r){r===void 0&&(r={});const n=r.whileElementsMounted,a=ae(()=>{var P;return(P=yo(r.open))!=null?P:!0}),o=ae(()=>yo(r.middleware)),i=ae(()=>{var P;return(P=yo(r.placement))!=null?P:"bottom"}),l=ae(()=>{var _(){typeof x=="function"&&(x(),x=void 0)}function C(){if(_(),n===void 0){y();return}if(s.value!=null&&c.value!=null){x=n(s.value,c.value,y);return}}function L(){a.value||(m.value=!1)}return yS={side:"bottom",sideOffset:0,sideFlip:!0,align:"center",alignOffset:0,alignFlip:!0,arrowPadding:0,hideShiftedArrow:!0,avoidCollisions:!0,collisionBoundary:()=>[],collisionPadding:0,sticky:"partial",hideWhenDetached:!1,positionStrategy:"fixed",updatePositionStrategy:"optimized",prioritizePosition:!1},[wS,xS]=ir("PopperContent");var _S=ce({inheritAttrs:!1,__name:"PopperContent",props:l0({side:{type:null,required:!1},sideOffset:{type:Number,required:!1},sideFlip:{type:Boolean,required:!1},align:{type:null,required:!1},alignOffset:{type:Number,required:!1},alignFlip:{type:Boolean,required:!1},avoidCollisions:{type:Boolean,required:!1},collisionBoundary:{type:null,required:!1},collisionPadding:{type:[Number,Object],required:!1},arrowPadding:{type:Number,required:!1},hideShiftedArrow:{type:Boolean,required:!1},sticky:{type:String,required:!1},hideWhenDetached:{type:Boolean,required:!1},positionStrategy:{type:String,required:!1},updatePositionStrategy:{type:String,required:!1},disableUpdateOnLayoutShift:{type:Boolean,required:!1},prioritizePosition:{type:Boolean,required:!1},reference:{type:null,required:!1},asChild:{type:Boolean,required:!1},as:{type:null,required:!1}},{...yS}),emits:["placed"],setup(e,{emit:t}){const xS({placedSide:L,onArrowChange:k=>u.value=k,arrowX:D,arrowY:H,shouldHideArrow:B}),(k,F)=>(W(),de("div",{ref_key:"floatingRef",ref:l,"data-reka-popper-content-wrapper":"",style:Be({...b(x),transform:b(_)?b(x).transform:"translate(0, kS=ce({inheritAttrs:!1,__name:"PopperArrow",props:{width:{type:Number,required:!1},height:{type:Number,required:!1},rounded:{type:Boolean,required:!1},asChild:{type:Boolean,required:!1},as:{type:null,required:!1,default:"svg"}},setup(e){const{forwardRef:t}=We(),r=wS(),n=ae(()=>CS[r.placedSide.value]);return(a,o)=>(W(),de("span",{ref:i=>{b(r).onArrowChange(i)},style:Be({position:"absolute",left:b(r).arrowX?.value?`${b(r).arrowX?.value}px`:void 0,top:b(r).arrowY?.value?`${b(r).arrowY?.value}px`:void 0,[n.value]:0,transformOrigin:{top:"",right:"0 0",bottom:"center 0",left:"100% 0})},[K(w2,Le(a.$attrs,{ref:b(t),style:{display:"block"},as:a.as,"as-child":a.asChild,rounded:a.rounded,width:a.width,height:a.height}),{default:Y(()=>[ge(a.$slots,"default")]),_:3},16,["as","as-child","rounded","width","height"])],4))}}),SS=kS;function ES(e){const t=Vs({nonce:le()});return ae(()=>e?.value||t.nonce?.value)}function ld(e,t="hex"){switch(t){case"hex":return TS(e);case"rgb":return LS(e);case"hsl":return PS(e);case"hsb":return DS(e);default:throw new Error(`Unknown format: ${t}`)}}function TS(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:Bn(e),r=n=>Math.round(n).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");if(t.alpha<1){const n=Math.round(t.alpha*255).toString(16).padStart(2,"0");return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}${n}`}return`#${r(t.r)}${r(t.g)}${r(t.b)}`}function LS(e){const t=e.space==="rgb"?e:Bn(e),{r,g:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`rgba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)}, ${o})`:`rgb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}, ${Math.round(a)})`}function PS(e){const t=e.space==="hsl"?e:wo(e),{h:r,s:n,l:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsla(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsl(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function DS(e){const t=e.space==="hsb"?e:ol(e),{h:r,s:n,b:a,alpha:o}=t;return o<1?`hsba(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%, ${o})`:`hsb(${Math.round(r)}, ${Math.round(n)}%, ${Math.round(a)}%)`}function Bn(e){if(e.space==="rgb")return e;if(e.space==="hsl")return NS(e);if(e.space==="hsb")return RS(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${e.space}`)}function wo(e){return e.space==="hsl"?e:BS(Bn(e))}function ol(e){return e.space==="hsb"?e:IS(Bn(e))}function BS(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,l=0;const u=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(l=u>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:l*100,l:u*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function NS(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const l=(c,d,f)=>(f<0&&(f+=1),f>1&&(f-=1),f<.16666666666666666?c+(d-c)*6*f:f<.5?d:f<.6666666666666666?c+(d-c)*(.6666666666666666-f)*6:c),u=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-u;a=l(s,u,t+1/3),o=l(s,u,t),i=l(s,u,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function IS(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let l=0;const u=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:l=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:l=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:l=(t-r)/i+4;break}l/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:l*360,s:u*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function RS(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const l=Math.floor(t*6),u=t*6-l,s=n*(1-r),c=n*(1-u*r),d=n*(1-(1-u)*r);switch(l%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=c,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=c,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=c;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function bi(e){switch(e){case"hue":return{min:0,max:360,step:1};case"saturation":case"lightness":case"brightness":case"alpha":return{min:0,max:100,step:1};case"red":case"green":case"blue":return{min:0,max:255,step:1};default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${e}`)}}function yi(e,t){switch(t){case"red":return e.space==="rgb"?e.r:Bn(e).r;case"green":return e.space==="rgb"?e.g:Bn(e).g;case"blue":return e.space==="rgb"?e.b:Bn(e).b;case"hue":return e.space==="hsl"?e.h:wo(e).h;case"saturation":return e.space==="hsl"||e.space==="hsb"?e.s:wo(e).s;case"lightness":return e.space==="hsl"?e.l:wo(e).l;case"brightness":return e.space==="hsb"?e.b:ol(e).b;case"alpha":return e.alpha*100;default:throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}}function Fa(e,t,r){const n=bi(t),a=Math.max(n.min,Math.min(n.max,r));if(t==="alpha")return{...e,alpha:a/100};if(t==="red"||t==="green"||t==="blue"){const i={...Bn(e),[t==="red"?"r":t==="green"?"g":"b"]:a};return FS(i,e.space)}if(t==="hue"||t==="lightness"){const i={...wo(e),[t==="hue"?"h":"l"]:a};return pm(i,e.space)}if(t==="saturation"){if(e.space==="hsb"){const u={...ol(e),s:a};return Am(u,e.space)}const i={...wo(e),s:a};return pm(i,e.space)}if(t==="brightness"){const i={...ol(e),b:a};return Am(i,e.space)}throw new Error(`Unknown channel: ${t}`)}function FS(e,t){if(t==="rgb")return e;if(t==="hsl")return hm(e);if(t==="hsb")return gm(e);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function pm(e,t){if(t==="hsl")return e;const r=OS(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsb")return gm(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function Am(e,t){if(t==="hsb")return e;const r=MS(e);if(t==="rgb")return r;if(t==="hsl")return hm(r);throw new Error(`Unknown color space: ${t}`)}function hm(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n);let i=0,l=0;const u=(a+o)/2;if(a!==o){const s=a-o;switch(l=u>.5?s/(2-a-o):s/(a+o),a){case t:i=(r-n)/s+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:i=(n-t)/s+2;break;case n:i=(t-r)/s+4;break}i/=6}return{space:"hsl",h:i*360,s:l*100,l:u*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function OS(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.l/100;let a,o,i;if(r===0)a=o=i=n;else{const l=(c,d,f)=>(f<0&&(f+=1),f>1&&(f-=1),f<.16666666666666666?c+(d-c)*6*f:f<.5?d:f<.6666666666666666?c+(d-c)*(.6666666666666666-f)*6:c),u=n<.5?n*(1+r):n+r-n*r,s=2*n-u;a=l(s,u,t+1/3),o=l(s,u,t),i=l(s,u,t-1/3)}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function gm(e){const t=e.r/255,r=e.g/255,n=e.b/255,a=Math.max(t,r,n),o=Math.min(t,r,n),i=a-o;let l=0;const u=a===0?0:i/a,s=a;if(a!==o){switch(a){case t:l=(r-n)/i+(r<n?6:0);break;case r:l=(n-t)/i+2;break;case n:l=(t-r)/i+4;break}l/=6}return{space:"hsb",h:l*360,s:u*100,b:s*100,alpha:e.alpha}}function MS(e){const t=e.h/360,r=e.s/100,n=e.b/100;let a=0,o=0,i=0;const l=Math.floor(t*6),u=t*6-l,s=n*(1-r),c=n*(1-u*r),d=n*(1-(1-u)*r);switch(l%6){case 0:a=n,o=d,i=s;break;case 1:a=c,o=n,i=s;break;case 2:a=s,o=n,i=d;break;case 3:a=s,o=c,i=n;break;case 4:a=d,o=s,i=n;break;case 5:a=n,o=s,i=c;break}return{space:"rgb",r:a*255,g:o*255,b:i*255,alpha:e.alpha}}function il(e){const t=e.trim().toLowerCase();if(t.startsWith("#"))return zS(t);if(t.startsWith("rgb"))return US(t);if(t.startsWith("hsl"))return $S(t);if(t.startsWith("hsb")||t.startsWith("hsv"))return WS(t);throw new Error(`Unable to parse color: ${e}`)}function zS(e){let t=e.slice(1);if(!/^[0-9A-F]{3}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{6}$/i.test(t)&&!/^[0-9A-F]{8}$/i.test(t))throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}. Expected format: #RGB, #RRGGBB, or #RRGGBBAA`);if(t.length===3&&(t=t.split("").map(r=>r+r).join("")),t.length===6){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>16&255,g:r>>8&255,b:r&255,alpha:1}}if(t.length===8){const r=parseInt(t,16);return{space:"rgb",r:r>>24&255,g:r>>16&255,b:r>>8&255,alpha:(r&255)/255}}throw new Error(`Invalid hex color: ${e}`)}function US(e){const t=e.match(/rgba?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid RGB color: ${e}`);return{space:"rgb",r:parseFloat(t[1]),g:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function $S(e){const t=e.match(/hsla?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSL color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsl",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),l:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function WS(e){const t=e.match(/hsb[av]?\(\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*,\s*([\d.]+)%?\s*(?:,\s*([\d.]+)\s*)?\)/);if(!t)throw new Error(`Invalid HSB color: ${e}`);return{space:"hsb",h:parseFloat(t[1]),s:parseFloat(t[2]),b:parseFloat(t[3]),alpha:t[4]?parseFloat(t[4]):1}}function qS(e){return typeof e=="string"?il(e):e}function VS(e){try{return il(e),!0}catch{return!1}}const[HS,GS]=ir("ColorFieldRoot");var XS=ce({inheritAttrs:!1,__name:"ColorFieldRoot",props:{modelValue:{type:[String,Object],required:!1},defaultValue:{type:[String,Object],required:!1,default:"#000000"},colorSpace:{type:String,required:!1,default:"hsl"},channel:{type:String,required:!1},placeholder:{type:String,required:!1},disabled:{type:Boolean,required:!1,default:!1},readonly:{type:Boolean,required:!1,default:!1},disableWheelChange:{type:Boolean,required:!1,default:!1},locale:{type:String,required:!1},step:{type:Number,required:!1},asChild:{type:Boolean,required:!1},as:{type:null,required:!1,default:"div"},name:{type:String,required:!1},required:{type:Boolean,required:!1}},emits:["update:modelValue","update:color"],setup(e,{emit:t}){const r=e,n=t,{colorSpace:a,channel:o,disabled:i,readonly:l,disableWheelChange:u,placeholder:s,locale:c,step:d}=Er(r),{forwardRef:f,currentElement:p}=We(),A=xg(p);rk(c);const h=Ea(r,"modelValue",n,{defaultValue:r.defaultValue,passive:r.modelValue===void 0}),m=ae({get:()=>qS(h.value??"#000000"),set:X=>{const U=ld(X,"hex");h.value=U,n("update:color",X)}}),g=le(""),x=le(!1);Je(()=>m.value,X=>{x.value||(g.value=y(X))},{immediate:!0});function y(X){if(o.value){const U=yi(X,o.value);return o.value==="alpha",String(Math.round(U))}return ld(X,"hex")}const _=0,C=16777215,L=10;function P(){return d.value!=null?d.value:o.value?bi(o.value).step:1}function B(X){g.value=X}function S(){if(x.value=!1,o.value){const X=parseFloat(g.value);if(!isNaN(X)){const U=bi(o.value),ne=Math.max(U.min,Math.min(U.max,X));m.value=Fa(m.value,o.value,ne)}g.value=y(m.value)}else{const X=g.value.trim();VS(X)&&(m.value=il(X)),g.value=y(m.value)}}function D(X){const U=Math.trunc(X),ne=m.value.space==="rgb"?Math.round(m.value.r)<<16|Math.round(m.value.g)<<8|Math.round(m.value.b):(()=>{const Ae=Bn(m.value);return Math.round(Ae.r)<<16|Math.round(Ae.g)<<8|Math.round(Ae.b)})(),J=`#${Math.min(Math.max(ne+U,_),C).toString(16).padStart(6,"0")}`;m.value=il(J),g.value=y(m.value)}function H(){if(i.value||l.value)return;const X=P();if(o.value){const U=yi(m.value,o.value);m.value=Fa(m.value,o.value,U+X),g.value=y(m.value)}else D(X)}function k(){if(i.value||l.value)return;const X=P();if(o.value){const U=yi(m.value,o.value);m.value=Fa(m.value,o.value,U-X),g.value=y(m.value)}else D(-X)}function F(){if(i.value||l.value)return;const X=P()*L;if(o.value){const
